message:
shared,web: Extract line offset for Edit tool diffs

Parse line numbers from Claude Code Edit tool results to display
correct file positions in the diff viewer. The tool result contains
a `cat -n` formatted snippet showing the edit context with line
numbers.

Changes:
- Extract lineOffset from structuredPatch.oldStart or cat -n output
- Pass lineOffset to DiffViewer component
- Generate proper unified diff hunk headers with actual line numbers
- Filter /clear commands from transcripts (no value in keeping them)

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/b34d4925-a5db-485b-98c0-5c6aaea2f0d8
